title: Beast Wars II
synopsis: On the planet Gaia, Lio Convoy leads a team of Maximals against the Predacon emperor Galvatron, who seeks to harvest the planet's powerful Angolmois Energy. This Japanese-exclusive 2D animated series expanded the Beast Wars universe with a lighter tone and an expansive cast.

episodes.title: The New Forces Arrive!
episodes.synopsis: The Maximals, led by Lio Convoy, arrive on the planet Gaia and clash with Galvatron's Predacons for the first time over the planet's Angolmois Energy.

episodes.title: White Lion, Run!
episodes.synopsis: Lio Convoy demonstrates his power in lion mode as he races to protect his team from a Predacon ambush in the Gaian wilderness.

episodes.title: Bighorn's Rage
episodes.synopsis: The hot-headed Maximal Bighorn lets his temper get the better of him during a mission, putting the team at risk during a confrontation with the Predacons.

episodes.title: The Lake Trap
episodes.synopsis: The Predacons set a trap for the Maximals at a lakeside energon deposit. The Maximals must outsmart Galvatron's forces to escape.

episodes.title: Galvatron Revived
episodes.synopsis: Galvatron undergoes a power boost from Angolmois Energy, becoming even more dangerous. The Maximals face his enhanced wrath.

episodes.title: Mystery of the Ancient Ruins
episodes.synopsis: The Maximals discover ancient ruins on Gaia that may hold clues about the planet's mysterious connection to Angolmois Energy.

episodes.title: The Insect Corps Arrive
episodes.synopsis: A new squad of insect-themed Predacon soldiers arrives on Gaia as reinforcements for Galvatron, bolstering the Predacon forces significantly.

episodes.title: Friend or Foe? The Insect Robos
episodes.synopsis: The Maximals are unsure whether the newly arrived Insectrons are enemies or potential allies, as the insect warriors seem to follow their own agenda.

episodes.title: The Strongest Tag Team?
episodes.synopsis: Two Maximals pair up to take on a duo of Predacon warriors in a fierce battle, testing the limits of teamwork and combination attacks.

episodes.title: Autorollers, Roll Out!
episodes.synopsis: The Autorollers, a trio of transforming Predacon vehicles, are deployed by Galvatron to crush the Maximals with their heavy firepower.

episodes.title: Danger! Scissor Boy
episodes.synopsis: The Predacon Scissor Boy proves to be a surprisingly formidable opponent for the Maximals with his unpredictable fighting style.

episodes.title: Galvatron Rampages
episodes.synopsis: Galvatron goes on a destructive rampage fueled by Angolmois Energy, and the Maximals must find a way to stop his berserker assault.

episodes.title: Predacon General Offensive!
episodes.synopsis: A clip show recapping the battle between the Maximals and Predacons on Gaia as Galvatron launches an all-out offensive.

episodes.title: The Combined Giant, Tripledacus
episodes.synopsis: The three Jointrons combine to form the mighty Tripledacus. Their allegiance becomes a pivotal factor in the war on Gaia.

episodes.title: The Festive Jointrons
episodes.synopsis: The Jointrons bring a comical and festive energy to the conflict, as their eccentric personalities clash with both the Maximals and Predacons.

episodes.title: A Fearsome Combination Plan?
episodes.synopsis: Galvatron devises a plan to create his own combiner force to counter Tripledacus, leading to chaotic results.

episodes.title: Who Is the Leader!?
episodes.synopsis: A leadership dispute erupts among the Predacon ranks as several warriors vie for command, creating an opportunity for the Maximals.

episodes.title: The Black Lio Convoy
episodes.synopsis: A dark doppelganger of Lio Convoy appears, forcing the real Maximal leader to confront a twisted mirror of himself.

episodes.title: The Space Pirate Seacons!
episodes.synopsis: The Seacons, a band of space pirates with aquatic beast modes, arrive on Gaia seeking the Angolmois Energy for themselves.

episodes.title: Who Is the Strongest Warrior!?
episodes.synopsis: A clip show framed around a debate about which warrior on Gaia is the most powerful, reviewing key battles from the series.

episodes.title: The Tentacular Scuba
episodes.synopsis: The Maximal Scuba gets into trouble during an underwater mission and must rely on his unique abilities to survive a Predacon attack.

episodes.title: Megastorm's Reckoning
episodes.synopsis: Megastorm, Galvatron's ambitious brother, makes a bid for power against his sibling, threatening to split the Predacon forces.

episodes.title: Showdown in the Sea
episodes.synopsis: An epic underwater battle erupts between the Maximals and the Seacons as both sides fight for control of a submerged Angolmois Energy cache.

episodes.title: Face the Setting Sun
episodes.synopsis: A reflective episode as the Maximals and Predacons pause to consider the cost of their war on Gaia and the lives affected by the conflict.

episodes.title: The Final Battle
episodes.synopsis: A climactic battle erupts as the first phase of the war on Gaia reaches its peak, with Lio Convoy facing Galvatron in a decisive showdown.

episodes.title: Enter Lio Junior
episodes.synopsis: A new young Maximal warrior, Lio Junior, arrives and joins Lio Convoy's team, bringing fresh energy to the Maximal forces.

episodes.title: Megastorm Reborn
episodes.synopsis: Megastorm undergoes a dramatic upgrade and is reborn as the more powerful Gigastorm, shifting the balance of power among the Predacons.

episodes.title: The New Weapon, Tako Tank
episodes.synopsis: The Maximals deploy a new weapon called the Tako Tank in their fight against the Predacons, turning the tide of a key battle.

episodes.title: The Artificial Planet Nemesis
episodes.synopsis: A clip show that introduces the artificial planet Nemesis, a massive Predacon weapon that threatens the entire planet Gaia.

episodes.title: Gigastorm's Treachery
episodes.synopsis: Gigastorm betrays Galvatron in a power grab, attempting to seize control of the Predacon forces and the Nemesis for himself.

episodes.title: The End of Starscream
episodes.synopsis: The treacherous Starscream meets his fate in a dramatic confrontation, bringing an end to one of the Predacons' most scheming members.

episodes.title: The Lio Convoy Assassination Plot
episodes.synopsis: The Predacons hatch an elaborate scheme to assassinate Lio Convoy, forcing the Maximal leader to fight for his survival.

episodes.title: The Great Angolmois Freezing Tactic
episodes.synopsis: The Maximals attempt a desperate strategy to freeze the Angolmois Energy to prevent the Predacons from harvesting it.

episodes.title: Knock Out Nemesis
episodes.synopsis: The Maximals launch a daring mission to disable the Nemesis, the Predacons' planet-destroying superweapon orbiting Gaia.

episodes.title: Lio Junior's Revolt!?
episodes.synopsis: Young Lio Junior rebels against Lio Convoy's orders, striking out on his own against the Predacons with reckless determination.

episodes.title: Emissary of the Fourth Planet
episodes.synopsis: A mysterious emissary from a fourth planet arrives on Gaia bearing critical information about the Angolmois Energy's true origin.

episodes.title: The Crisis of Planet Gaia
episodes.synopsis: Planet Gaia faces an existential crisis as the Predacons' exploitation of Angolmois Energy threatens to destroy the world itself.

episodes.title: Fly Out! Planet Gaia
episodes.synopsis: As Gaia nears destruction, the Maximals evacuate and launch a desperate counterattack to save the planet from total annihilation.

episodes.title: Assemble, Thirty-Nine Warriors
episodes.synopsis: A clip show that rallies together the full roster of warriors who have appeared throughout the series, reflecting on their battles and bonds.

episodes.title: Revenge of the Space Pirates
episodes.synopsis: The Seacons return seeking vengeance, attacking both the Maximals and Predacons in a chaotic three-way battle for Angolmois Energy.

episodes.title: Breaking into Nemesis
episodes.synopsis: The Maximals launch a covert infiltration of the Nemesis fortress to disable its weapons from within before Galvatron can use them.

episodes.title: Legend! The Green Warrior
episodes.synopsis: A legendary green warrior emerges to aid in the final battle, as the conflict on Gaia reaches its ultimate climax.

episodes.title: Farewell! Lio Convoy
episodes.synopsis: In the series finale, Lio Convoy leads the Maximals in a final decisive battle against Galvatron. The war on Gaia ends as the Angolmois Energy is sealed away and scattered into space as capsules.

facts: Beast Wars II used traditional 2D animation rather than the CGI of the North American Beast Wars series, produced by Ashi Productions.
The series was created to fill the gap in Japan while the second season of the North American Beast Wars was being dubbed, as the shorter seasons left a scheduling void.
The show featured a notably more humorous and lighter tone than the original Beast Wars, targeting a younger audience.
Beast Wars II takes place concurrently with the events of the original Beast Wars series but on a different planet called Gaia.
The Angolmois Energy introduced in this series became a key plot element in Beast Wars Neo, where it was scattered across the galaxy as capsules.
A theatrical movie, 'Beast Wars II: Lio Convoy, Close Call!', was released on December 19, 1998, as a companion to the TV series.
